title: ollama/ollama
summary: Ollama official repo: get up and running with Llama 2, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client for Ollama; chat, embed, pull and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official Ollama JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node & browsers; same API surface as the Python client.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration to use any Ollama model as an LLM or embeddings provider in LangChain apps.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Feature-rich, self-hosted ChatGPT-style web interface for Ollama; manage models & chat in the browser.

title: ollama-gui
summary: Lightweight Flutter desktop app that wraps Ollama for macOS/Linux/Windows.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-built interactive REPL for Ollama with syntax highlighting and persistent context.

title: ollama-copilots
summary: VS Code extension bringing local Ollama models into GitHub Copilot-style inline suggestions.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin to chat, generate and refactor code using any Ollama model without leaving the editor.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal retrieval-augmented-generation setup combining Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-hostable Discord bot that lets servers chat with local Ollama models via slash commands.

title: ollama-telegram
summary: Lightweight Telegram bot wrapper for Ollama; supports group chats and private conversations.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration letting you use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack pipelines.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama service in CI pipelines for testing LLM-powered features.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selection and autoscaling.

title: ollama-docker
summary: Official container images and compose examples for CPU & GPU (CUDA/ROCm) workloads.
